# Meticulous LLC

## About
Meticulous LLC is a complete property care company serving Rutland County, Vermont. Founded by Daniel Villarreal, the company provides year-round property maintenance for homeowners, second-home owners, and local businesses across Killington, Rutland, Woodstock, Ludlow, Pittsfield, Chittenden, Mendon, Proctor, West Rutland, Brandon, and Castleton.

## Services
- Grounds Maintenance: Routine mowing, trimming, edging, seasonal cleanups, mulch installation, shrub and hedge trimming
- Landscaping: Garden design, planting, bed installation, landscape renovation
- Property Maintenance: Exterior repairs, pressure washing, gutter cleaning, general upkeep
- Snow and Ice Management: Commercial and residential plowing, sanding, salting, roof raking
- Hardscaping: Patios, walkways, retaining walls, stone work, bluestone and paver installation
- Carpentry: Decks, porches, fencing, trim work, structural repairs
- Housekeeping: Interior cleaning, deep cleaning, turnover cleaning for rental properties
- Rental Property Support: Full-service property management for second homes and vacation rentals

## Service Area
Rutland County, Vermont: Killington, Rutland, Woodstock, Ludlow, Pittsfield, Chittenden, Mendon, Proctor, West Rutland, Brandon, Castleton
